CHART 177
The native will live serving
under others and having several Ven. Dt.
sources of income. He will not save
anything but will spend away all his Sat.
earnings by taking hasty and unwise Sun
decisions. The first setback will come .
Mer.
at 26, but he will improve his position
from the 30th year onwards. Again, he
will face trouble around 40-41 . He Jupt. Db. Mars
will take up some independent work;
but will fail in that venture. At 43, he will change his place and start a new
job and do well in it. He will have five children of which three will come up
very well. How much he may earn he will not be able to save as the Sun is in
12th to Venus who is all alone. He will live upto the 68th year.
